snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Ritiesh D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heartвА¶ 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji вАФ IndiaвАЩs Greatest Warrior King. рЯСС 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. рЯЪ© 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh
Music: Ajay-Atul 
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (Asc, Isc)
Story screenplay: Ajit wadekar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Aak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Choreographer: Remo DвАЩsouza
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
DirectorвАЩs Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Sound Mixing
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Re-recording mixer:
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of one of IndiaвАЩs Greatest Warrior King вАУ Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi, and Telugu.
 
1st May 2026
In Cinemas
A Jio Studios Release

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2

Lai bari Lai 
Lai bari Lai 
Maya cha hai dil bhari nai 
Banai khayo dadelo le 
Manai Khayo timro maya le 


Hamro Bhetghat Pahilo Choti Ho ( lhasso )
Bhana Aja kahi katai Jane Ho ( lhasso )
Kusume Rumal Chino Laijau ( Saachai )
Yespali Lane Gari rachu Dai ma ta


Dada Kada Katera Ma sangai Jauna tmi 
Timro mana samma jane bato Dekhaideuna hai 
Maya Tarki farki jharki bhayeni Boli deuna hai

Khelna Deu 
Herna Deu 
Salkeko jawani Fakreko Maya maa Palkeko ma pani 
Cha maya cha katai 
Sirfula Siraima Laidium ki chhapakai


Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2



Mutu Dhak Dhak BP high Body maa Heat 
Chinta Nagara ma Gardimla thik
ausadhi lekhdya chu 7 din ko 
Khop lagai dinchu 7 inch ko 

Dr. St Man Bhaye Kina attina paryo 
Bihana ki diuso ki Rat dina paryo 
Dina maa 5 ki 7 ki 8 Dina paryo 
Vana Body ko kun Part jach dina paryo 

Big House Big Dream Big chain Big Thing 
Living Fast Chasing Dream Lifestyle mainstream 
Deko haina guff 
Maya vanda Badhi Garchau Business Talk 
She don't believe in love tara chaiyo mero love 
Yeah

Aare Aare Aare Aare 
Aare Apango 
Aale Aale Aale Aale 
Aale Apango 
Nga Mula Ela semri taa Mula Ngada Tha mula 
Maya La Mula Chyago 

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Janti boki aula 10 gate bihibar 
Gaubhari masu ra bhat 
Kodo Ko Raksi chyang Nigar Bidi cigar
K khane K piune afno bichar 
Malai daijo maa maya  chaiyo ajambari 
Meri Sakambari timlai samhali  rakchu rakam sari
Ful chari diula timro harek kadam pachi 
Siudo maa timro mang bharidinchu 
9 biga bari timro nam garidinchu 
9 mahina maa ghorle paune kam gardinchu
5 biga garib lai daan garidinchu 

Hooo Hooo Hooo 

Haa

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe


Fulaiko Fulbari maa 
fulai lw Sajaidiula 
Appa Ra Aame le Mane ta 
Aune Saal Bhagai diula 
Pardaina Aatina 
Bichaima Chaddina 
Tayar chu Sath dina 
Hapta ko Sath dina 
Lhassooooo

snippet.title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

вАЬSupergirl,вАЭ DC StudiosвАЩ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, вАЬSupergirl,вАЭ which will be in theaters and IMAX ¬Ѓ across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

Novos encontros com gigantes e reencontros h√° muito esperados se desenrolam. Um novo cap√≠tulo colossal come√Іa enquanto a tripula√І√£o embarca em uma aventura como nenhuma outra, tudo em busca do tesouro supremo, o "ONE PIECE!"

id.description:
Penayangan anime ONE PIECE akan dilanjutkan di Jepang dengan kru berlayar menuju Elbaph!

5 April 2026 23:15 (JST)

вЩ™ LAGU PEMBUKA "Luminous" oleh AiNA THE END

вЧЖ Sinopsis
Setelah melarikan diri dengan berani dari Pulau Masa Depan Egghead, Kru Topi Jerami menetapkan tujuan mereka menuju destinasi legendaris. Bergabung dengan Bajak Laut Prajurit Raksasa yang perkasa, mereka akhirnya mencapai Elbaph, Tanah Para Raksasa yang telah lama ditunggu-tunggu.

Pertemuan baru dengan para Raksasa, dan reuni yang telah lama diharapkan terungkap. Babak baru yang kolosal dimulai saat kru menuju petualangan yang belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya, semuanya dalam pengejaran harta karun utama, "ONE PIECE!"

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | GRAND FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The GRAND FINALS of BGIS 2026 are here.

No more second chances. No more fallback stages.
This is where the trophy is decided.

After months of competition, the final teams stand ready to battle for the championship title and the ultimate prize. Every drop, every rotation, every fight now carries legacy weight.

One stage. One champion.

Watch the GRAND FINALS live and witness the conclusion of BGIS 2026.

рЯО§ Lyrics: Banjaare - Bairan

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–µ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–µin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

Pardeshma Mera Swami (Official Video)| Haribhakta Budhathoki | Tek BC | Rekha Joshi | Santosh Sunar

рЯОµ Pardeshma Mero Swami | Official Video рЯОµ

Lyrics & Presentation: Haribhakta Budhathoki

A deeply emotional song that reflects the pain, love, and longing of a wife whose husband is far away in a foreign land. Pardeshma Mero Swami beautifully captures the reality of distance, sacrifice, and unbreakable connection of hearts.

Pardeshma Mera Swami (Official Video)| Haribhakta Budhathoki | Tek BC | Rekha Joshi | Santosh Sunar

рЯОµ Pardeshma Mero Swami | Official Video рЯОµ

Lyrics & Presentation: Haribhakta Budhathoki

A deeply emotional song that reflects the pain, love, and longing of a wife whose husband is far away in a foreign land. Pardeshma Mero Swami beautifully captures the reality of distance, sacrifice, and unbreakable connection of hearts.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH. You asked for it. This was absolutely INSANE.

Follow my socials:
вЮљ Twitter - @dream
вЮљ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
вЮљ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames 
George:  @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap:  @Sapnap 
Antfrost:  @Antfrost 
awesamdude:  @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

вЮ§вЮ§ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
вЮ§вЮ§ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


вЮ§вЮ§Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbldjZlI3Y2JVMm1FOURuaV9HRnI5bloxYWk2Z3xBQ3Jtc0tsNGctQ19SMGdrMURUUEE5VjBOdzV1QzYyYlIxeVRnR19RLTlfUGtWbF9GQmtFQVNCR2Vsam5pQWpuVDFiTTdzTWRzQkE3aktWUzd5TjBaOHpuUGtqVURwZXI3TFhtd0d2SWhlbVMtLXFTNTUyS3VHUQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fshare.epidemicsound.com%2F1xis5q%2F%3Fplaylist%3Duad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y&v=3V7Rvo4Gvic

рЯОµ Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

en.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
en.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

вЮ§вЮ§ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
вЮ§вЮ§ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb

snippet.title: Mitta Ror - Sheesha (Lyrics) ft. Swara Verma | Aakhya Mai Aakh Ghali Jo Bairan
snippet.description:
Mitta Ror, Swara Verma - Sheesha
Stream/Download ~

~ MUSIC INFO ~
Song Title : SHEESHA
Starring : Mitta Ror
Singer : Swara Verma & Mitta Ror
Lyricist/composer: Mitta Ror
Music production : Yeah Ishwar
Mix/Master - Baally 

~ Follow Mitta Ror ~
https://www.instagram.com/official_mitta_ror

~ Lyrics ~ Mitta Ror - Sheesha ft. Swara Verma 
Teri Aage Pichhe Laage Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jibb Te Re Pakda Yo Hath Tane Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To Ghabrandi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala Bhut Merepe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Mane Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Dub Gaya Mai Billi Billi Aankhya Mein Bairan

Teri Hasi Ke Hasi Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Me Pair Bhi Na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe Ghane Bair Chhori Re

Tu Fursat Te Ghadi I Think Meri Jaan
Honth Tere Lal Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid Tu Mila Ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane Main Sync Meri Jaan

Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage Se Ameer Chhore Re

Ho Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Mane Dil Ka Tu Lage Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Me Dive Makha Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Kise Paache Itne Na Phhire
Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

Ho Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II PHASE 2 - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #SCYTES #LF #A1
snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia returns with a new chapter. 

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

Across multiple days of action, every match will test consistency, teamwork, and decision-making.
Every elimination matters. Every rotation counts. Every moment can change the leaderboard. 

Expect clutch plays, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves.

Only one team will rise above all and be crowned the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now. 

рЯПЖ PARTICIPATING TEAMS

рЯУЖ Phase 1: March 24 - March 26
рЯУЖ Phase 2: April 1 - April 3, 2026

6 Matches Per Day
18 Matches Per Phase

The team with the best overall performance across all matches will be crowned the PUBG MOBILE 141 Ultimate Grind Champion.

snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


вАЬTimi HoвАЭ  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

вАЬTimi HoвАЭ is now streaming on all platforms.

рЯО§ Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.description:

Beat Prod, Mix/Mastered: Kpass

ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX вАФ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun вАФ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

Ў®ЎєЎѓ Ў∞ўДўГЎМ ўКўЕўГўЖўЗ ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўГЎіЎІўБ ЎєЎІўДўЕ ROBLOX ўИЎІўДЎ™ўБЎІЎєўД ўЕЎє ЎІўДЎҐЎЃЎ±ўКўЖ ўЕўЖ ЎЃўДЎІўД ЎІўДЎѓЎ±ЎѓЎіЎ© Ў£ўИ ўДЎєЎ® ЎІўДЎ£ўДЎєЎІЎ® Ў£ўИ ЎІўДЎ™ЎєЎІўИўЖ ўБўК ўЕЎіЎІЎ±ўКЎє Ў•Ў®ЎѓЎІЎєўКЎ©. ўКўПўЕўЖЎ≠ ўГўД ўДЎІЎєЎ® Ў£ўКЎґўЛЎІ ўВЎЈЎєЎ© Ў£Ў±Ўґ ЎІўБЎ™Ў±ЎІЎґўКЎ© ЎЇўКЎ± ўЕЎЈўИЎ±Ў©ЎМ Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ ўЕЎђўЕўИЎєЎ© Ў£ЎѓўИЎІЎ™ ЎІўБЎ™Ў±ЎІЎґўКЎ© ўДЎ™ЎµўЕўКўЕ ўИЎ®ўЖЎІЎ° Ў£ўК ЎіўКЎ°ЎМ Ў≥ўИЎІЎ° ўГЎІўЖ ўЖЎІЎЈЎ≠Ў© Ў≥Ў≠ЎІЎ® ўВЎІЎ®ўДЎ© ўДўДЎІЎ≥Ў™ўГЎіЎІўБЎМ Ў£ўИ ЎЈЎІЎ¶Ў±Ў© ўЗўДўКўГўИЎ®Ў™Ў± ЎєЎІўЕўДЎ©ЎМ Ў£ўИ ЎҐўДЎ© Ў®ўКўЖЎ®ўИўД ЎєўЕўДЎІўВЎ©ЎМ Ў£ўИ ўДЎєЎ®Ў© "ЎІўДЎІЎ≥Ў™ўКўДЎІЎ° ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎєўДўЕ" ўЕЎ™ЎєЎѓЎѓЎ© ЎІўДўДЎІЎєЎ®ўКўЖЎМ Ў£ўИ Ў£ўК ЎІЎ®Ў™ўГЎІЎ± ЎҐЎЃЎ± ўДўЕ ўКЎЃЎЈЎ± ЎєўДўЙ Ў®ЎІўД Ў£Ў≠Ўѓ. ўЗЎ∞ўЗ ЎІўДўВЎЈЎєЎ© ЎІўДЎ£ўИўДўЙ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎ£Ў±Ўґ ЎІўДЎІўБЎ™Ў±ЎІЎґўКЎ© ўЕЎђЎІўЖўКЎ©. ўЕўЖ ЎЃўДЎІўД ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІЎ±ўГЎ© ўИЎ®ўЖЎІЎ° Ў£ЎіўКЎІЎ° Ў±ЎІЎ¶ЎєЎ©ЎМ ўКўЕўГўЖ ўДЎ£ЎєЎґЎІЎ° ROBLOX Ў±Ў®Ў≠ ЎіЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ ўЕўЕўКЎ≤Ў©ЎМ Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ ЎєўЕўДЎ© ROBLOX (Robux). ўИЎ®ЎѓўИЎ±ўЗўЕЎМ ўКўЕўГўЖўЗўЕ ЎІўДЎ™Ў≥ўИўВ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎ™ЎђЎ± ЎІўДЎ•ўДўГЎ™Ў±ўИўЖўК ўДЎіЎ±ЎІЎ° ўЕўДЎІЎ®Ў≥ ўИЎ•ўГЎ≥Ў≥ўИЎІЎ±ЎІЎ™ ўДЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ўЗўЕ ЎІўДЎІўБЎ™Ў±ЎІЎґўКЎ©ЎМ Ў®ЎІўДЎ•ЎґЎІўБЎ© Ў•ўДўЙ ўЕўИЎІЎѓ Ў®ўЖЎІЎ° ўЕўЕўКЎ≤Ў©ЎМ ўИўЕўГўИўЖЎІЎ™ Ў™ўБЎІЎєўДўКЎ©ЎМ ўИЎҐўДўКЎІЎ™ ЎєЎІўЕўДЎ©.

Teri Yadon Me Rone Lage, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai вАФ jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai вЭ§пЄП

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate

Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

Things got heated in Indian Theft Simulator today! When Nobita refused to share his favorite excavator, ShinchanвАЩs legendary temper took over. In a moment of pure rage, Shinchan smashed the excavator to pieces! рЯШ±
Nobita, heartbroken and in tears, ran to get Bhabhi. After a heavy scolding and even getting kicked out of the house, Shinchan was about to leave... until Jack Bhaiya made his grand entry! рЯШО
Watch how Jack Bhaiya fixes the brotherly bond by taking them both to the toy showroom. Will a brand-new Realistic Oil Tanker for Shinchan and a shiny Auto-Rickshaw for Nobita finally bring peace? Or is this just the beginning of a new prank?
Watch till the end to see their reaction! рЯОђ

Nobita, heartbroken and in tears, ran to get Bhabhi. After a heavy scolding and even getting kicked out of the house, Shinchan was about to leave... until Jack Bhaiya made his grand entry! рЯШО
Watch how Jack Bhaiya fixes the brotherly bond by taking them both to the toy showroom. Will a brand-new Realistic Oil Tanker for Shinchan and a shiny Auto-Rickshaw for Nobita finally bring peace? Or is this just the beginning of a new prank?
Watch till the end to see their reaction! рЯОђ

#IndianTheftSimulator #ShinchanVsNobita #JackBhaiya #RCGaming #ToyWar #EmotionalGaming #ShinchanHindi #NobitaStories #GamingLife #YouTubeShorts #TrendingGaming #ToyChallenge #RealisticGaming #shinchanfunnymoments 

Video Disclaimer & Credits:
This video is a unique combination of AI-enhanced storytelling and original gameplay.
вАЛThe Process: I use AI technology for the creative 1-minute intro/visuals, followed by my own original gameplay and voice-over for the rest of the 10-12 minute video.
вАЛVoice & Characters: All character voices (like Shin-chan, Nobita, and Doraemon) are creatively performed by me using voice modulation and filters to enhance the storytelling.
вАЛEditing & Quality: This content is edited by me (Original Editing) and rendered in 60fps for the best viewer experience.
вАЛFictional Content: This is a fan-made parody created for entertainment purposes only. No copyright infringement is intended.

The city is flooding fast and itвАЩs my job to clear blocked drains, control the water, and stop the disaster before everything goes underwater! 

In this Drain Simulator gameplay / walkthrough (Part 1), youвАЩll see intense flood chaos, satisfying drain cleanup, and some close calls as the water level keeps rising.

If you enjoy simulator games, flood rescue missions, and satisfying cleanup gameplay, youвАЩre in the right place!

snippet.title: Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
snippet.description:
Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head)ft. beabadoobee  
i'll make a cup of coffee for your head lyrics     

Stream:-  
https://Powfu.lnk.to/ListenID 



Follow Powfu: 
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followII
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followWI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followTI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followFI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followWI



Lyrics:- 

[Intro: beabadoobee]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed


[Verse 1: Powfu]
Yeah, I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future 'cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you've been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hopin' you'll find someone else
'Cause yeah, we still young, there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it out this bed
I hope I go to heaven so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending


[Chorus: beabadoobee, Powfu, beabadoobee & Powfu]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Yeah, ayy)
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Ayy, yeah)


[Verse 2: Powfu]
I'm happy that you here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger, you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos and walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sing me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays, went to church, on Mondays, watched a movie
Soon you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me


[Chorus: beabadoobee, Powfu, beabadoobee & Powfu]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed


[Outro: beabadoobee]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed





Tags:-

snippet.title: Ed Sheeran - Perfect (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
рЯСС Ed Sheeran - Perfect (Lyrics)
рЯФ• Help us reach 50,000 subscribers!
рЯФФ Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

рЯОІ Stream & Download: 

вЬ® Follow Ed Sheeran:


√Ч=√Ч=√Ч=√Ч=√Ч  

Lyrics for "Ed Sheeran - Perfect"

[Verse 1]
I found a love for me
Oh darling, just dive right in and follow my lead
Well, I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
Oh, I never knew you were the someone waiting for me
'Cause we were just kids when we fell in love
Not knowing what it was
I will not give you up this time
But darling, just kiss me slow, your heart is all I own
And in your eyes, you're holding mine

[Chorus]
Baby, I'm dancing in the dark with you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass, listening to our favourite song
When you said you looked a mess, I whispered underneath my breath
But you heard it, darling, you look perfect tonight

[Verse 2]
Well I found a woman, stronger than anyone I know
She shares my dreams, I hope that someday I'll share her home
I found a love, to carry more than just my secrets
To carry love, to carry children of our own
We are still kids, but we're so in love
Fighting against all odds
I know we'll be alright this time
Darling, just hold my hand
Be my girl, I'll be your man
I see my future in your eyes

[Chorus 2]
Baby, I'm dancing in the dark, with you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass, listening to our favorite song
When I saw you in that dress, looking so beautiful
I don't deserve this, darling, you look perfect tonight

[Instrumental]

[Chorus 3]
Baby, I'm dancing in the dark, with you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass, listening to our favorite song
I have faith in what I see
Now I know I have met an angel in person
And she looks perfect
I don't deserve this
You look perfect tonight

√Ч=√Ч=√Ч=√Ч=√Ч

snippet.title: This Is the Sound of Clash! рЯОЄрЯТ• Clash of Clans Music Video Animation
snippet.description:
Monsters. Music. Mayhem! Take up your sword and make some noise for the most hardcore season in Clash history!

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇ https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇ https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok вЦЇ https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress

snippet.title: Dil Aaya - Aviverse | вА™вА™ @astheticavi  |вА™вА™ @MeAbhishekShukla   (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
STREAM All Songs Of  Aviverse : https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someoneвАЩs beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Audio Credits:

Song Name : Dil Aaya
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Music Producer : Abs

Video Credits:
 
Cast:  Tanvi Duggal , Janhavi Joshi , Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Director: Joseph B. 
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Cinematographer : Vasu Menon 
Assistant Cinematographer : Archit
Line Producer: Shravan
Editor: Ajmal Rasali
Colorist: Ajmal Rasali
Poster & Thumbnail Designer: Junaid & Shreyas


Stream On Aviverse Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

Aviverse's Instagram -      / aviversemusic    
Abhishek's Instagram -       / abhishekxavi    
Avinash's Instagram -         / aesthetic_avii    

Lyrics  :  

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Haath pakad ke sang chal de tu

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Kinni soni hai, mainu lagti tu

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Jaati hai tham ab saansein meri
Jab aati tu paas mere

Ghayal karta hai tera woh kajal mujhe
Jab takti ye akhiyan tujhe

Dulhan banaunga, tujhko sajaunga
Mehndi laga ke rakhna, doli mein launga

Jo na maane ye duniya, toh ladd bhi jaunga
Haathon ko thaam le, main waada nibhaunga

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se
